infoPlist.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: OpenWhoop uses Bluetooth to connect to your WHOOP band and read heart rate, HRV, and other health data.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: OpenWhoop uses Bluetooth to connect to your WHOOP band.
infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: OpenWhoop reads your health data to display alongside WHOOP metrics.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: OpenWhoop writes heart rate, HRV, sleep, and workout data from your WHOOP band to Apple Health.

plugins.healthSharePermission: OpenWhoop reads Apple Health so WHOOP-derived trends can be compared with your existing health data.
plugins.healthUpdatePermission: OpenWhoop writes heart rate, workouts, temperature, and other supported WHOOP metrics into Apple Health.
